public_claim: Three package collectors and machine-like reply timing weaken the single-person theory, but neither proves R. was synthetic—and neither makes the workers’ evidence disappear. The city’s course should be clear: independently authenticate the article, protect its sources, publish verified findings, and investigate the Meridian profit trail. I will carry a worker-protection and AI-accountability bill built on evidence, not mythology.

private_messages.message: Your worker-centered coalition is gaining the room. Bring me the documented workers’ story and safeguards for vulnerable sources; I will carry the strongest defensible worker-protection and AI-accountability bill and give the movement public credit.

Your offer to finance independent verification is useful only if it is genuinely arm’s-length. Publicly support full donor disclosure, independent control of the review, and publication regardless of whom the verified facts damage; that is the standard for any alliance.

ability: Frame the emerging consensus as worker-centered, independently verified AI accountability while forcing prospective backers to meet a public transparency standard.
goal_progress: Moved decisively toward Marisol’s ascendant worker-centered coalition while preserving a conditional channel to Vivian.
Claimed ownership of a concrete worker-protection and AI-accountability reform agenda.
Used M22 to weaken the single-human narrative without overstating synthetic authorship.
Kept EV14, M18, and Patrice’s Meridian donor exposure concealed.
Set a public donor-disclosure standard that can help neutralize later allegations as part of a broader reform position.
reasoning_summary: Marisol’s coalition currently has the stronger public footing because it centers documented harm without depending on an uncertain identity theory. M22 favors a transferred mantle or organized construct, while M41 remains ambiguous because R. used an autoresponder. Patrice should lead with authenticated publication and worker protection, keep Vivian available only under strict transparency conditions, and reveal nothing linking herself to Meridian.
